violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as beverages) in the 2 door refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC relocated eggs. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) was observed with an accumulation of dark colored debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC too unit out of service to be washed/sanitized. PIC disposed of ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026

Based on records, establishment is not consistent at maintaining logs (filling in all spots) and is keeping boba longer than 4 hours. PIC informed how to completely fill in logs and to not keep boba longer than 4 hours. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the mixer and 2 door fridge door have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026
The ceiling in the beverage area is in poor repair (peeling paint). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2026

The walls throughout the kitchen areas have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026

Raw animal foods (such as eggs and raw chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as salad mix) in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
Sanitizing dispenser at 3 bay sink was not pulling sanitizer at proper concentration. Establishment is manually mixing santizer. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024
Faucet at 3 bay sink was observed leaking. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024
The walls by the autofry have an accumulation of soil residue and grease. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024
